result: The task has been successfully completed. The dataset containing the derived variable 'alcfst' (earliest age of alcohol consumption) along with the NSID has been saved to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The variable 'alcfst' is a factor with levels for each observed age (14, 15, 16, 17, 19, 20, 25, 32), plus 99 for 'Never had alcohol' and -8 for 'Don't know/insufficient information'.
